== Notes for [[Item:Q105561|Q105561]] ==

30 Generations to [http://www.geni.com/people/Rabbi-Ovadyah-I-HaDayan/6000000007315823544 '''Rabbi Ovadyah I HaDayan רבי עובדיה הראשון הדיין'''] ancestor of Maimonides - see below:

Maimonides was born Moses ben Maimon on the eve of Passover in 1135 in Cordoba, Spain, to a prominent rabbinical family.

In his family tree figured King David and Rabbi Yehudah HaNassi (135 - 219) who had compiled the Mishnah.

*[http://www.geni.com/people/Maimonides-Rambam-%D9%85%D9%88%D8%B3%D9%89-%D8%A7%D8%A8%D9%86-%D9%85%D9%8A%D9%85%D9%88%D9%86-%D7%A8%D7%9E%D7%91-%D7%9D/6000000007315933705#/tab/overview Maimonides]

Hillel Hazaken

l

Yehuda HaNasi

I

Unknown Generations ( circa 8 centuries ) to...

l

Maimonides,

Rambam who signs himself in one place as,

“Moshe son of the great chacham Rabeinu Yosef;

son of the rav, the dayan Rabeinu Ovadya;

son of the rav, the dayan Rabeinu Shlomo;

son of the rav, the dayan Rabeinu Yosef;

son of the rav, the dayan Rabeinu Ovadya zt”l.”

______________

Rambam,

Moses Maimonides*

descendants...

____________

I

Avraham HaNaggid

I

David HaNaggid

I

Avraham II HaNaggid

I

Yehoshua HaNaggid

I

David II HaNaggid

-------------------------

*[http://www.elmorahillsminyan.org/Home/gedolim/sefardi-gedolim Family History]

-----------------------

* Calculating approx. 25 years / generation

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000007310989980

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
